name: Freeze Ray
description: You shoot three heat-seeking rays of frigid energy at up to three targets within a moderate (20 unit) distance. Each ray deals 7 cold damage if your spell check beats the target's defense. If a single target takes more than 20 cold damage and your spell check is double their resilience, they become frozen until the end of their next turn.
charge: Minions and grunts become frozen if they take any cold damage from one of the rays.
